title: Glazin 8x
description: A Bold & Simplistic 8x Resource pack for both Java and Bedrock Edition.
body:
### **What is Glazin 8x?**

Glazin 8x is a Simplistic Resource pack for Minecraft. The pack is typically regarded as a successor to a equally prominent pack, Mazin 8x. Glazin is Incredibly Light in terms of storage and system upkeep, use this pack and you will see a rise in framerate.

### **Why Glazin 8x?**

* It's light, detailed, enjoyable, and compact. Perfect for lower-end devices, but don't let that case scenario stop you from enjoying it on higher-end hardware as well.
* It has several versions available and includes additional support for a series of mods.
* The Pack is beloved for it's unique understanding of Shading, Color Theory, and Experimentation.
* The Pack Certainly does not shy away from pushing the boundaries of pixelated understanding in a pixelated world.

### **Info & Credentials**

* The Bedrock Edition can be found on The Official Minecraft Marketplace.
* Created & Uploaded to Modrinth By MazinMark
* Thanks to MCPEDL, Planet Minecraft, Curseforge, and Modrinth for accepting & hosting my Resources!!!
